titleStmt.title: SII 22.33: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 33. (A.R. No. 33 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA III—21st YEAR (A.D. 1236-37)

summary.p: This registers an agreement among the aḍaippar and the kuḍimakkaḷ of Erukkāṭṭuchchēri which is called a tirunandāviḷakkuppuṟam village of the temple of Kālakāladēvar, that they would burn 3 lamps in the temple from the 21st year onwards of the king, in token of their grateful appreciation of the help rendered to them by Araiyaṉ Āḷuḍaiyāṉ [Nāṅgūrā]ḻvār of Śīgār in Puliyūrnāḍu a division of Arumoḻidēvā-vaḷanāḍu. During his administration as Piḷḷai Kaikkaṇakkanār he is said to have got them exemption from viniyōgam and attended to all their needs without stint and also further restored to them after diligent search some charter of privilege in original which had been granted to them in the 13th year of ‘Periyadēvar’ and which he now passed on to the palace through the village watchman as a charter of security to the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 1] jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu Amparṉāṭu Uṭpaṭame vūr Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmi kaḷukku Iṉṉāyaṉār tirununtāviḷakku—
ppuṟam Erukkāṭṭucceri Aṭaipparum kuṭimakkaḷum Ivvaṉaivom nāṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu piḷḷai kaikkaṇakkaṉār Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu puliyūrnāṭṭu cikāruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Āḷuṭaiyā nāṅkūrāḻvār Eṅkaḷai Ūrāka Aḻait taruḷi Eṅkaḷūrkku viṉiokam varātapaṭiyum maṟṟu Oru kuṟai piṟavāta—
paṭiyum nokki Āḷukaiyālum periyatevarkku patiṉmuṉṟāvatu nāḷil Eṅkaḷūrkku māṉalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻutiṉa Oḻuku Eṅkaḷpakkal niṉṟum corvupaṭṭu poṉayitu Iruntaṭam Ārāyntu Eṅkaḷukku vāṅkit tantaruḷi Ivvoḻukiṉpaṭi Eṅkaḷūrkkuḷḷaṭai Eḻutivittu tantaruḷi mūlavoḻuku tiruvācali—
le Eṅkaḷūrkkāka niṟkiṟa meykāppār vaḻiyāka vaippittaruḷiṉa Itu Ūrkku Irakṣaiyākaiyālum Ivvūr Irupatāvatuvarai Iṟuttuvanta tirununtā viḷakku Irunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟeḻe kāle Araikkālukku meṟpaṭa Ivarkku taṉmamāka Iraṇṭaraiye Araikkāl viḷakku—
kku veṇṭum nilattukku nilamuṟṟum Aṉupavikkiṟārperilum tirutti Aṉupavikkiṟārperilum Ēṟakkaṇṭa nilamāy nāṅkaḷ pervaḻi Eḻutikkuṭuttapaṭi yey Irupattoṉṟāvatu Aippaci viṣu mutal cantirātittavaṟ tirumuṉpe Eriyak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kal—
veṭṭikkoḷvatākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu nāṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷukku tirununtāviḷakkup puṟam Erukkāṭṭucceri Aṭaipparum kuṭimakkaḷum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku I cāttaṅkuṭai (kuṭai)yāṉ kuṟumpūr nāṭ—
ṭukkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai neṭuñcerikuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiru viraṭṭāṉaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Itu Uṟattuṭaiyāṉ kāṉavāṉaiveḷāṉum putuvūruṭaiyāṉ ciṅkayaveḷāṉum kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai kālaṉaiya karntaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puḷiyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ kālaṉaiyakarnta veḷāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai kaṇṇaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ākkūrnāṭṭukkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai maṅkiḻaṅkiḻavaṉ Eṇṇātutaittaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ kāla kālatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Erukkuṭaiyāṉ Ātittaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Itu maṅkalaṅkiḻavaṉ nampiyum cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ tevanum kaiymāṭṭāṅkāṉa—
maikku Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ kālakālatevaṉ Eḻuttu Itu tiruvāñciyamuṭaiyāṉ marutaṉum paruttikkuṭaiyāṉ vāṭṭi cevaṭiyāṉum piṟaiyāṟukiḻavaṉ kālakālatevaṉum piṟaiyāṟukiḻavaṉ periyāṉum kaiymāṭṭāṅ kāṉamaikku Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ kālakālatevaṉ Eḻuttu Itu cātta ṉuṭaiyāṉ kāṟṟukai kuḷa—
ttuṭaiyāṉum yāṉum kiḻavaṉ nānanampiyum tirunalakkuṭaiyāṉum kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai kuṟumpūrnāṭṭukon Eḻuttu piḷḷaiyā veḷāṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Itu liyar kiḻavaṉ tevaṉum toṭṭakkuṭaiyāṉ tāḻiyum
kaimāṭṭāṅkānamaikku Ivai kuṟumpūrnāṭṭukkoṉ Eḻuttu Itu piṟaiyāṟukiḻava tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉum piṟaiyāṟukiḻavan kūṟṟu Utaittāṉum kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku cāttan Uṭaiyān kālakālatevan Eḻuttu Ivai Āttappāṭi Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu
Ivai tevakaḷnāyakan kaimāṭṭāṅkānamaikku Ivai kālaṉaikāñca veḷān Eḻuttu Ivai puṟaiyāṟukiḻavan viman Eḻuttu Ivai pāmpuṇikiḻavan Aṇṭān Aruḷāḷan Eḻuttu Itu Iluppai Uṭaiyāṉ celvan kaimāṭṭāṅ kānamaikku Ivai cāttan Uṭaiyān Ampalavaṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkānamaikku Ivai kuṟum—
pūrnāṭṭukon Eḻuttu Itu puṟampiluṭaiyāṉ perumānum cātta nuṭaiyān vempanum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānum kaimmāṭṭāṅkānamaikku Ivai Ulakuṇṭāṅkātta cūriyatevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirukkaṭavūr Āccāryan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
